title: Kumbh: Among the Seekers
desc: The filmmaker showcases the Kumbh Mela in India and shines a light on the many elements, both human and technical, that create this unique experience.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: Rick negotiates with a BMX stunt rider who brings in his 1976 Evel Knievel Junior Roadmaster bike, offering a discount if the client gives a daring performance.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Kenny Crossley faces transportation challenges at an El Monte auction caravan. Meanwhile, Rene and Casey find success with their storage unit.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: The buyers travel to Palm Springs to check out higher end goods. Meanwhile, Kenny amps up the profit on an unimpressive unit.

title: Tour D' Royale
desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: The prodigal smiths of New Agrarian School in Bigfork, Montana are put to a gruelling challenge in order to prove their mettle and win a grand prize.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Shipping an iconic piece from a popular ghost movie has Roy at his wit's end. Meanwhile the Two Blondes take on a load of dinosaurs.

desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

desc: Kenny Crossley faces transportation challenges at an El Monte auction caravan. Meanwhile, Rene and Casey find success with their storage unit.

title: Storage Wars
desc: The buyers travel to Palm Springs to check out higher end goods. Meanwhile, Kenny amps up the profit on an unimpressive unit.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host meets some of the most remarkable individuals of India like a football player with an incredible sense to balance stuff, an architect who builds houses from recycled paper and more.

title: Life After People
desc: Without humans, water becomes a destroyer that brings chaos, flooding cities, collapsing dams and awakening ancient forces that were previously contained.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: Renowned actor and host Morgan Freeman revisits some of the most daring jailbreaks conducted by ingenuous prisoners from across the globe.

title: Nature Gone Wild
desc: High up above the dangerous terrain of the Himalayas, an adventurous paraglider accidentally becomes entangled with a vulture, plummeting them both to the ground.

title: The Fast History Of
desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the owner of 'Dunkin' Donuts' who reinvented the dessert and created 52 flavour, which gave his biggest rivals a run for their money.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: A submarine car from the James Bond movie turns up in the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler negotiate a deal with an antique store.

title: Forged in Fire: Beat the Judges
desc: Three skilled champions return for an opportunity to take down a judge but only two move forward to recreate an exquisite Falcata.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: Take a look at an innovative robot that has excellent culinary skills. Also, meet Dattadri Kothur who found an eco-friendly solution to dispose Ganesha idols.

title: Storage Wars
desc: The buyers travel to Palm Springs to check out higher end goods. Meanwhile, Kenny amps up the profit on an unimpressive unit.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Danny revisits an old project, a 1967 Ford Bronco restoration that the shop must turn around quickly. Meanwhile, a client brings in a 1950 Harley Davidson.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: Dan Aykroyd sheds light on shipwrecks, plane crashes and UFO sightings. Later, he explores the Lake Michigan Triangle, weird wilderness and other spooky places.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: A pair of brazen killers execute a daring breakout from Elmira State Prison when the convicts scale the towering forty-foot walls, fleeing via the rooftop.
